title: TerraBlenderFix
description: Fixes a performance issue related to TerraBlender's surface rule api
body:
Fixes a performance issue caused by how TerraBlender injects its surface rules
(this is essentially a hack and is expected to cause issues with some mods)

Note:
If you have Regions Unexplored, you must use v0.5.6+ or certain biomes will have incorrect surfaces

Nature's Spirit is currently incompatible

![Performance difference for a 2000 chunk radius](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8a4b018a35b16d038c51a7815b6e4d95868581c1.png)
